creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
It appears that there are some missing depends.  After installing the 
package on multiple systems, the GUI was not working.

I then applied the patch and tried to build from source.  I had to 
install qt4-uic, qt4-moc, and qt4-rcc in order to
complete the build.  The GUI now works.

These three may not be the only ones missing, since I had a lot of other 
packages preinstalled, including the following
qt4 packages:

FreeBSD sculpin bacon ~ 401: pkg info qt4\*
qt4-assistant-4.8.5_1
qt4-clucene-4.8.5
qt4-corelib-4.8.5_1
qt4-declarative-4.8.5
qt4-doc-4.8.5
qt4-gui-4.8.5
qt4-help-4.8.5
qt4-linguist-4.8.5_1
qt4-network-4.8.5
qt4-opengl-4.8.5
qt4-script-4.8.5
qt4-sql-4.8.5
qt4-sqlite-plugin-4.8.5
qt4-svg-4.8.5
qt4-webkit-4.8.5_1
qt4-xml-4.8.5
qt4-xmlpatterns-4.8.5
